name: mittwald/imapsync
description: Roundcube plugin that pulls mail from a remote IMAP account into the currently logged-in mailbox. PHP-native sync via rcube_imap_generic.

authors.name: Mittwald CM Service GmbH & Co. KG

scripts.analyse: sh -c 'if php -r "exit(PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80400 ? 0 : 1);"; then docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -w /app php:8.3-cli php vendor/bin/psalm --no-progress; else psalm --no-progress; fi'
scripts.dist:fetch: sh -c 'if [ -d dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0 ]; then echo "dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0 already present, skipping."; exit 0; fi; curl -fLsS -o dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0-complete.tar.gz https://github.com/roundcube/roundcubemail/releases/download/1.7.0/roundcubemail-1.7.0-complete.tar.gz && tar -xzf dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0-complete.tar.gz -C dist && rm dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0-complete.tar.gz && echo "dist/roundcubemail-1.7.0 ready."'

scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run the in-memory unit-test suite (fast, no Docker).
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the Dovecot integration suite (requires a running Docker daemon).
scripts-descriptions.analyse: Run Psalm static analysis over imapsync.php, lib/, and tests/.
scripts-descriptions.dist:fetch: Download and extract Roundcube 1.7.0 source into dist/ for local reference. Idempotent.
